summary: The main claim is: Stick with just A and B, alignment researcher and alignment subject.
An human-level automated alignment researcher is an AGI, also a human-level AI capabilities researcher.

The main claim is: This is intentional: in my opinion, I think it is far more valuable to have some specific gears-level model of how to think about AI safety, rather than a shallow overview of many different possible ways of thinking about AI safety.
The main claim is: Removing this means that the same l1\ loss is applicable to a broad range of dictionary sizes.

What we see instead, though, is that there are a number of features which are highly similar between dictionaries, and the number of these features grows with dictionary size, though not as fast as the number of features which are totally…
The main claim is: This part is I think the one that's most uncertain, and the one where I am less convinced of the doom argument.
Overall I think it's likely that we have enough material to cover this point already pretty convincingly.
The main claim is: Younger people seem more concerned than older people.
Black individuals appear to be somewhat more concerned than people who identified as White, Hispanic, or Other.

top_comment.author: Peter Wildeford
top_comment.text:
This is a great poll and YouGov is a highly reputable pollster, but there is a significant caveat to note about the pause finding.

The way the question is framed provides information about "1000 technology leaders" who have signed a letter in favor of the pause but does not mention any opposition to the pause. I think this would push respondents to favor the pause. Ideal question construction would present more neutrally with both support and oppose statements.
top_comment.claim: The comment's point: I think this would push respondents to favor the pause.

summary: The main claim is: Crossposted to EA Forum To help people find what to apply to, aisafety.training acts as a well-maintained living document of AI safety programs, conferences, and other events .
This will smooth the experience of people working on and joining AI safety and reduce the burden on word-of-mouth transmission of available programs.
The main claim is: It's the reason why the earth has spontaneous fires all over its surface.
This optimization occurred when life on earth was still single-celled.
The main claim is: To the extent AI and natural intelligence operate on similar principles, these adaptations should be expected to carry over when culture is used as a training dataset for AI.

The main claim is: LeCun explicitly says that "designing architectures and training paradigms for the world model constitute the main obstacles towards real progress in AI over the next decades." Why are world models so important?

I think the reason LeCun insists on using his unusual terminology is that he wants to emphasize that in this scheme, normative information does not come from an external source (like a reward provided by a human supervisor) but is an intri…
The main claim is: We believe that AI alignment research is pre-paradigmatic, with a diversity of potentially promising research agendas.
We believe that MATS should be a “mentor-centered” program, in that we are willing to be very flexible regarding mentors’ preferences regarding the structure and implementation of the program.
